mnemonics: Page Table Pyramid: P - Process, T - Table, P - Page
CAP Theorem: C - Consistency, A - Availability, P - Performance
keyPoints: Page Table Structure: Page Table Index (PTI), Page Table Entry (PTE)
Page Table Index (PTI): Page Number, Frame Number, Valid Bit, Dirty Bit
Page Table Entry (PTE): Page Frame Number, Page Directory Base, Valid Bit, Dirty Bit
Translation Lookaside Buffer (TLB): Cache of PTEs
Page Fault: Request to access page not in RAM
Page Replacement Policy: Least Recently Used (LRU), First Come First Served (FCFS)
Page Frame Allocation: Frame allocation algorithm (FIFO, LRU, Optimal)
Page Fault Handling: Handle page fault, recover to a stable state
Deadlock Prevention: Avoid circular wait, avoid resource starvation
Deadlock Detection: Detect deadlock, identify critical sections
Deadlock Resolution: Abort one process, roll back one process, change priority
Banker's Algorithm: Resource allocation and deallocation algorithm
